plugin.name: dynspaces
plugin._long: Dynamic workspace and fullscreen app management.

option.name: add_workspace
option._long: Adds an empty workspace next to the currently active one

option.name: remove_workspace
option._long: Removes the currently active workspace, merging it with the next one

option.name: keep_empty_workspace
option._long: Automatically ensure there's always one empty (unoccupied) workspace at the end of the list

option.name: fullscreen_apps_as_workspaces
option._long: Try to treat full-screen windows as workspaces of their own
